subclass_descriptions.Guardian: Frontline protector with high defense and steady control.
subclass_descriptions.Berserker: Aggressive bruiser that trades safety for raw damage.
subclass_descriptions.Paladin: Holy defender mixing durability with support utility.
subclass_descriptions.Assassin: Fast burst killer focused on crits and target deletion.
subclass_descriptions.Ranger: Mobile ranged hunter with safe, consistent damage.
subclass_descriptions.Mage: Glass-cannon caster with powerful spell burst.
subclass_descriptions.Samurai: Precision duelist with fast strikes and disciplined offense.
subclass_descriptions.Cleric: Healing specialist that keeps allies alive under pressure.
subclass_descriptions.Bard: Buffer and enabler who boosts team tempo and survivability.
subclass_descriptions.Alchemist: Utility support using potions, toxins, and battlefield tricks.
subclass_descriptions.Necromancer: Dark caster with drain, decay, and soul-harvest sustain.
subclass_descriptions.Spellblade: Hybrid fighter weaving melee attacks with arcane power.
subclass_descriptions.ShadowKnight: Dark frontliner blending defense, drain, and pressure.
subclass_descriptions.Monk: Balanced close-range combatant with speed and self-discipline.
subclass_descriptions.Chronomancer: Time specialist that slows and desynchronizes enemy tempo.
subclass_descriptions.Warden: Zone defender that roots and controls movement lanes.
subclass_descriptions.Hexbinder: Curse caster that suppresses enemy output and scaling.
subclass_descriptions.Stormcaller: Displacement controller using chained shocks and knockback.

talents.name: Falcon Mark
talents.desc: Critical hits mark enemies to take bonus team damage.

talents.name: Volley Step
talents.desc: Attacking after a dodge fires an extra piercing arrow.

talents.name: Mercy Bloom
talents.desc: Healing pulses grant allies a brief regeneration buff.

talents.name: Sanctuary Veil
talents.desc: Low-health allies gain a small protective barrier.

talents.name: Adaptive Combo
talents.desc: Alternating mobility and offense grants stacking bonus output.

talents.name: Stance Echo
talents.desc: Skill use alternates defensive and offensive aftereffects.

talents.name: Iron Bastion
talents.desc: Standing still builds armor and reflects minor damage.

talents.name: Groundbreaker
talents.desc: Heavy strikes create shockwaves that slow enemies.

talents.name: Control Field
talents.desc: Control zones apply slow and damage suppression.

talents.name: Tempo Lock
talents.desc: Controlled targets take increased ability damage.
